MVRV.label: MVRV
MVRV.description: Market Value to Realized Value. High = overvalued = bearish.

SOPR.label: SOPR
SOPR.description: Spent Output Profit Ratio. Above 1 = coins moving in profit = bearish.

STH_SOPR.label: STH SOPR
STH_SOPR.description: Short-Term Holder SOPR. High = recent buyers in profit.

LTH_SOPR.label: LTH SOPR
LTH_SOPR.description: Long-Term Holder SOPR. High = long-term holders distributing.

NVT.label: NVT Ratio
NVT.description: Network Value to Transactions. High = overvalued vs on-chain activity.

NVM.label: NVM Ratio
NVM.description: Network Value to Metcalfe. High = overvalued vs network growth.

S2F_Dev.label: S2F Deviation
S2F_Dev.description: Stock-to-Flow model deviation. High = price above model = bearish.

Exch_Reserve.label: Exchange Reserve
Exch_Reserve.description: BTC held on exchanges (Binance). Rising = potential sell pressure.

Exch_Netflow.label: Exchange Netflow
Exch_Netflow.description: Net BTC inflow to exchanges. Positive = sell pressure = bearish.

Whale_Ratio.label: Whale Ratio
Whale_Ratio.description: Top-10 exchange inflows / total inflows. High = whale distribution.

MPI.label: MPI
MPI.description: Miners' Position Index. High = miners selling = bearish.

Puell.label: Puell Multiple
Puell.description: Daily miner revenue / 365-day MA. High = miners overselling = bearish.

Dormancy.label: Dormancy Flow
Dormancy.description: Average dormancy of spent outputs. High = old coins moving = bearish.

Lev_Ratio.label: Leverage Ratio
Lev_Ratio.description: Estimated leverage ratio on Binance. High = fragile market = bearish.

SSR.label: SSR
SSR.description: Stablecoin Supply Ratio. High = less stablecoin buying power = bearish.

Open_Interest.label: Open Interest
Open_Interest.description: Futures open interest (Binance). High = overheated = bearish.

Coinbase_Prem.label: Coinbase Premium
Coinbase_Prem.description: BTC premium on Coinbase vs Binance. Positive = US buying pressure = bullish.

NRPL.label: NRPL
NRPL.description: Net Realized Profit/Loss. Positive = profit-taking = bearish.

MVRV_Proxy.label: Mayer Multiple
MVRV_Proxy.description: Price / 200-day MA. Free proxy for MVRV. High = overvalued.

Puell_Proxy.label: Puell Proxy
Puell_Proxy.description: 14d price change / 365d price change. Miner revenue proxy.

RealVol_30.label: Realized Vol 30d
RealVol_30.description: 30-day annualized realized volatility. High = risk-off = bearish.

RealVol_90.label: Realized Vol 90d
RealVol_90.description: 90-day annualized realized volatility. High = risk-off = bearish.

LR_1Y.label: 1Y Log Return
LR_1Y.description: BTC 1-year log return. High = momentum / overbought = bearish.

LR_2Y_Z.label: 2Y Z-Score
LR_2Y_Z.description: BTC 2-year price z-score. High = extended above long-run mean = bearish.

VIX.label: VIX
VIX.description: CBOE Volatility Index. Spike = fear / capitulation = contrarian bullish.

DXY.label: DXY
DXY.description: US Dollar Index. Strong USD = risk-off = bearish for BTC.

SP500_Trend.label: S&P 500 Trend
SP500_Trend.description: S&P 500 % above/below 200-day MA. Positive trend = risk-on = bullish for BTC.

Gold_90d.label: Gold 90d Return
Gold_90d.description: Gold 90-day return. Rising gold = risk-off = bearish for BTC.

HY_Spread.label: HY Credit Spread
HY_Spread.description: High-yield credit spread (FRED: BAMLH0A0HYM2). High = credit stress = bearish.
